slides.title: Money stress is a *health* input.
slides.sub: Ongoing financial worry quietly taxes the body. Treating it as wellness, not just budgeting, may protect your healthspan.

slides.title: Worry has a body cost
slides.body: Chronic money stress keeps your stress response switched on. That steady drip *can raise cortisol* far longer than a single bad day.

slides.title: Wear adds up
slides.body: Researchers call the buildup allostatic load: the cumulative toll of staying on alert. Over years it *is linked to* faster bodily wear.

slides.title: Stress feeds inflammation
slides.body: Prolonged stress hormones can nudge the body toward low grade inflammation, which *is linked to* many age related conditions.

slides.title: Treat it like sleep
slides.body: You already track sleep and movement. Naming money stress as a real input *can help* you notice it before it compounds.

slides.title: Small buffers count
slides.body: Steady routines, honest conversations and tiny financial wins ease the load. Protecting calm *may protect* healthspan, not just your wallet.

slides.title: See how stress *shows up*.
slides.body: Vibe Health tracks your sleep, food, movement and steps, then turns them into one daily Health Score so you can watch how stressful stretches ripple through your body.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
Money stress doesn't stay in your bank account. It lives in your body too. 🌿💸

Chronic financial worry can raise cortisol, add to allostatic load and feed inflammation over time. Treating it as a health input, alongside sleep and movement, may help protect your healthspan. Save this for the next tight month. 🔖

Vibe Health turns your sleep, food, movement and steps into one daily score → link in bio.
youtube_title: Why Money Stress Is a Health Problem, Not Just a Wallet Problem
